title: Blockcrafted Fusion
description: Blockcrafted Fusion is a resource pack that merges the best of several popular packs to deliver a richer visual experience — while staying true to Minecraft’s original art style.
body:
## ✨ **Blockcrafted Fusion**

**🧱 Blockcrafted Fusion** is a resource pack that merges the best of several popular packs to deliver a **richer visual experience** — while staying true to **Minecraft’s original art style**.

-   🎒 Every **item** has been **remodeled in 3D** (from _[MB-3D Items Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mb3d-items-pack)_), keeping the **signature blocky look**.
    
-   📚 Each **enchanted book** now has its **own unique texture**, inspired by the **vanilla aesthetic** (_[Even Better Enchants](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/even-better-enchants)_).
    

🌿 This pack is ideal for players who want a **more lively and detailed Minecraft**, yet **faithful to its iconic visual identity**.

✅ Compatible with **versions 1.21.5 to 1.21.11**  
⚙️ No dependencies required

🙏 Thanks to [mythitorium](https://modrinth.com/user/mythitorium) and [mbanders](https://modrinth.com/user/mbanders) for their amazing work.

🧩 _A pack crafted by Élie — for those who love classic Minecraft, refined for the modern era._
